star_3.text: I really enjoy playing Obby Parkour Runner, but I have a few suggestions to make the game even better. It would be great if you could add a multiplayer mode so players can compete with friends. Also, removing the bots would make the gameplay more fun and challenging. Adding more mini-games, increasing the number of keys, and reducing the wait time for keys would make the game more engaging and enjoyable. Keep up the good work!

Obby Parkour Runner is a fun game with smooth parkour mechanics and creative obstacle levels. The gameplay is enjoyable and keeps you engaged as you progress. However, the game has some issues that hold it back. The lack of real multiplayer, the presence of bots, and the inability for players to create and publish their own games make it feel limited. Adding these features would greatly improve the experience. Overall, it’s a good game with strong potential if these problems are fixed.
